creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: If this is still an issue, could you please update the reproduction steps?  Firstly, there is no "fuse_wdfs" package.  Do you mean "fusefs-webdavfs"?  Secondly, the URL you provided doesn't help anybody without a local Confluence server.  Could you please provide the URL of a public server that demonstrates the problem, or instructions on how to setup a local server?
